arts.ttl: Newcastle United diehards brave journey to Brentford amid Storm Darragh warning
arts.sum: BBC Weather presenter Simon King said: "While there has been a lot of focus on the red warning and dangerous winds, there will be some nervousness about the heavy rain we’ve had after recent flooding from Storm Bert in late November. Toon supporters learned early in the journey from Newcastle that the Premier League clash between Liverpool and Everton, the last ever Merseyside derby at Goodison Park had been postponed due to the bad weather.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United fans told fate of Brentford game as Premier League release statement
arts.sum: Newcastle United's game with Brenford will go ahead today despite the chaos caused by Storm Darragh around the country. United fans have made the journey to London despite disruptions from Storm Darragh as the black and white swarm descended in London to rainy cold weather.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's £250m PIF goal unveiled as supremo hails 12 new sponsors
arts.sum: Newcastle United commercial supremo Peter Silverstone has made it clear that the Magpies must continue the "relentless chase" to catch up the Premier League's big guns. Silverstone, speaking at a fan event at the STACK, said: "The changes we have made require a lot of support and investment.

arts.ttl: Newcastle XI vs Brentford – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle head to Brentford in the Premier League this weekend looking for a first win in four games. Eddie Howe’s side have struggled for consistency this season but will be confident after an impressive performance to draw with Premier League leaders Liverpool in midweek. Alexander Isak continued his fine form with another goal against the […] The post Newcastle XI vs Brentford – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Newcastle get eyes on £50m transfer target after Eddie Howe's 'big signings' vow
arts.sum: Newcastle's right wing is the position to have dominated the headlines more than most in recent months, with Howe experimenting with five players - Miguel Almiron, Anthony Gordon, Harvey Barnes, Jacob Murphy and Joelinton - in that particular role so far this season. Already this season Newcastle's transfer team have had the chance to cast their eye over the likes of Jarrod Bowen of West Ham and Antoine Semenyo of Bournemouth in the flesh - two men who have been linked with Howe's side frequently.

arts.ttl: One Newcastle United transfer could unlock January window as pressure begins to build
arts.sum: Selling players has proved tricky for Newcastle in recent seasons but one star the club tried to move on over the summer was Miguel Almiron . Even as speculation swirled over a recent exit, Howe continued to back the wide man.

arts.ttl: Jacob Murphy gives Newcastle United dressing room truth on January transfer fears
arts.sum: Premier League positions, even in December, is still something being discussed by Newcastle players. Murphy, now 29 and part of the leadership group, said: "We have two transfer windows every year and we're linked with a million players, none have ever signed for us so to us so it's just another window and we take no notice.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United would have wanted me even with 'one leg' so I couldn't say no a second time
arts.sum: Remy shook hands with boss Alan Pardew, who made a 'fantastic offer', while Joey Barton even gave his Marseille team-mate an idea of what to expect at St James' Park . "When you're being offered an opportunity to play for a club with such a great atmosphere and for a coach who really wants you to be a part of his project, it's only ever going to be a yes.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United squad revealed for Brentford with Howe weighing up rotation dilemma
arts.sum: Of course the break meant long journeys and appearances for their countries for several of the United squad, with the likes of Anthony Gordon, Brumo Guimaraes, Alexander Isak, Tino Livramento, Lewis Hall and Miguel Almiron all involved last month. After two weeks of 'inactivity' during the last international break, Newcastle United play their fourth game in less than fortnight today when they take on Brentford at the Gtech Community Stadium.

arts.ttl: Is Brentford vs Newcastle United on TV, what time is kick-off and how can I follow it?
arts.sum: After the drama of the midweek draw with Liverpool, Newcastle United face perhaps just as big a test today when they take on Brentford at the Gtech Community Stadium. No one has picked up more points on their own turf than Brentford this season, with six wins and a draw from their seven games at home this term.
